heading: Today
text: Becoming cloudy.  Showers in NY spreading east this morning, reaching the Northeast Kingdom, White Mountains, and Eastern Township by midday, tapering to scattered showers south.  Highs in the 50s to near 60, falling during the rain showers.  Winds increasing from the south 10 to 15 mph, gusting to 25 mph from the Green Mountains west.

heading: Tonight
text: Mostly cloudy, with scattered, passing showers.  Lows in the upper 30s to mid 40s.  Winds southeast near 10 mph, gusting to 25 mph in the evening, decreasing overnight.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy, with occasional rain and showers, fewer and scattered through NY.  Highs in the 50s to low 60s.  Southeast winds becoming east near 10 mph.
